microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program into a **platformized system**, standardizing integration workflows across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling APIs and ETL pipelines that reduced operational toil by **30%** and enabled teams to deploy and iterate without engineering handholding.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, shipping end-to-end in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous production validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict compliance requirements.
Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning that restructured scheduling workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Acted as technical first responder post-deployment — triaging integration failures, patching webhooks, and tuning agent workflows based on live production traffic to hit go-live success targets across every rollout.

Coached enterprise IT stakeholders through UAT sessions and created operational playbooks that ensured agent workflows stuck after handoff, reducing post-launch support escalations across all **four partner deployments**.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across Azure, running discovery sessions and hands-on demos with 14 engineering teams that saved 37 hours of monthly manual effort and validated agent workflow ROI.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating logistics-style process pain into actionable specs.

Improved retrieval performance for LLM-powered tooling by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating docs to a **semantic search** platform, cutting lookup time by 83% and tightening the prompt-to-output feedback loop.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical ETL and provisioning paths — mirroring the load-lifecycle automation Vooma deploys for freight.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact integrations, and make data-driven resourcing decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and stress-testing edge cases before production rollout.

Coordinated IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and eliminating manual handoffs that stalled integration releases.

Facilitated Agile sprint ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain deployment velocity under tight production timelines.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow — standardizing discovery, scoping, and invoicing across 200+ monthly proposals and cutting the manual handoff time between sales and ops.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve top-of-funnel lead quality.

Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's data-driven decision-making on job selection.
